name: Pixela Corporation
summary: Pixela Corporation develops image processing technologies in the fields of software and hardware in Japan. The company develops digital televisions and set-top boxes that support ISDB system under the PRODIA brand name; receiver modules and middleware for OEM business; digital televisions for PCs; application software to receive digital broadcasting with Android smartphones; and image processing application software for PC use. Its mobile applications include SeeQVault, a player that allows user to play HD quality TV programs; and plane analyzer, a golf swing and analyzing software. The company's authoring products comprise 3D to LR Converter EX, which converts 3D video files recorded with a camcorder into two video files, including video for right-eye and video for left-eye; and PixeBurn! for HD, a software that enables to write videos recorded in AVCHD standard onto DVD or BD discs. Pixela Corporation was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
